response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems expertise, including real-time systems and event-driven architectures, which aligns well with the agentic AI and fintech requirements. However, his experience lacks direct involvement in multi-agent AI systems at scale, fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, payment flows), or regulated commercial environments. His leadership tenure at Shopify and Stripe is promising but may not fully match the executive-scaling expectations for a CTO role at a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with real-time and event-driven architectures
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and improving processes (e.g., Shopify, RIDE Capital)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP, Stripe)
concerns: Limited direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production or regulated financial environments
No clear fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, working-capital management)
Lack of demonstrated experience in AI-native fintech integration or compliance infrastructure
